title: sophora chrysophylla var. glabrata
intro: Sophora chrysophylla var. glabrata, also known as the Mountain Sophora, is a deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is rich in isoflavones, isoflavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Sophora chrysophylla var. glabrata is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
